seconds_per_game_day_note: 720 s/year ÷ 360 in-game days/year — calibratable link between wiki 'days' and sim time; not an officially sourced calendar constant.

happiness_page_candidate_formula.reference: Fandom Happiness page — community-sourced formula, not an official data dump (V1).
happiness_page_candidate_formula.example_claim: population 10, happiness 2 → ~31 days to next villager (per page; verify in-game)

starting_happiness_note: S2: No direct published MP starting-happiness row. Fandom Happiness: +2 per territory, population malus −1 for pop 1–10 on Normal → net +1 if no hidden clan modifiers — derivation only; treat as optional provisional default or override default_happiness if you prefer strict unknown.
colonization_duration_note: C2 — standard neutral colonization time not publicly sourced; do not infer from special zones.
fame_note: calibratable — not sourced as exact formula in expert answers

tracker_military_upkeep.note: M1 — numeric food/wood/kröwn upkeep per Tracker not publicly sourced; placeholders for flow model only.

town_hall_upgrade_duration_note: TH — upgrade duration still not publicly sourced (Fandom/northgard.wiki); build time ≠ upgrade time; placeholder only.
assume_great_hunt_for_mystical_kill_trop: When false, draugr/kobold/… rows in trophy_income_per_kill (great_hunt_only) use 0 — unknown without Great Hunt per wiki structure. Set true only when explicitly modeling post–Great Hunt.
